title: Verify that the 'CUTE' tab is selected and displays cute cat images
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'CUTE' tab in the gallery section.
expected_result: The 'CUTE' tab should be highlighted, and the grid should display images of cute cats.

title: Navigate to the 'PLEADING' tab and verify the content
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'PLEADING' tab in the gallery section.
expected_result: The 'PLEADING' tab should be highlighted, and the grid should display images of cats with pleading expressions.

title: Navigate to the 'ACTIONS' tab and verify the content
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'ACTIONS' tab in the gallery section.
expected_result: The 'ACTIONS' tab should be highlighted, and the grid should display images of cats with various actions.

title: Verify that the progress slider is functional
test_steps: Open the app and interact with the progress slider in the header.
expected_result: The progress slider should allow the user to navigate through different sections of the gallery.

title: Verify that the speaker icon is functional
test_steps: Open the app and interact with the speaker icon in the header.
expected_result: The speaker icon should allow the user to enable or disable the sound for the gallery.

title: Verify that the refresh icon is functional
test_steps: Open the app and interact with the refresh icon in the header.
expected_result: The refresh icon should allow the user to refresh the gallery content.

title: Verify that the back arrow is functional
test_steps: Open the app and interact with the back arrow in the header.
expected_result: The back arrow should allow the user to navigate back to the previous screen.

title: Verify that the grid of cat images is clickable
test_steps: Open the app and click on one of the cat images in the grid.
expected_result: The app should navigate to a detailed view of the selected cat image.

title: Verify that the grid of cat images is scrollable
test_steps: Open the app and scroll through the grid of cat images.
expected_result: The app should allow the user to scroll through the grid of cat images.

title: Verify that the grid of cat images is swipeable
test_steps: Open the app and swipe through the grid of cat images.
expected_result: The app should allow the user to swipe through the grid of cat images.
